Off Calendar Oct-02-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
David Russell Shane, Esq. of SHANE & TAITZ 986-5400, for plaintiff Nokia Inc., moving
for leave to amend complaint
Draius Ogloza, Esq. of LATHAM & WATKINS 395-8149, for defendants Aerzone Corp. and SoftNet Systems, Inc., opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court granted Plaintiff NOKIA, INC.'s motion for leave to amend complaint on condition that plaintiff does not oppose to any motion to continue the trial date, all discovery completed in advance. All documents on which plaintiff relies on re: the compensatory damages theory to be hand delivered on 10/7 at 8:00 a.m. All depositions should be completed on 10/11. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (JJM/301/MD) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855
